propositions: Plan-review rounds have a ~50-67% per-round BLOCK rate with 87% of blocking findings new each round.
A single defect fans out into up to 10 blocking findings per round.
The convergence rising floor never engages in BLOCK loops because eligibility requires a prior CERTIFIED signature that BLOCK verdicts never mint.
Coaching notes and criteria-guide deep-links attach only to ADVISORY findings, never to the blocking findings agents must remediate, and plan authors are not routed to the criteria guide.
The T5c security overlay produces a large advisory wall including out-of-scope findings.
Remediation must land without weakening the gate: blocking findings still block, dedup groups rather than drops findings, and coaching stays move-registry-constrained.
